page_metadata.biotools__summary: This package defines classes for representing genomic intervals and provides functions and methods for working with these. Note: The package provides the basic infrastructure for and is enhanced by the package 'girafe'.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This package defines classes for representing genomic intervals and provides functions and methods for working with these. Note: The package provides the basic infrastructure for and is enhanced by the package 'girafe'.
